top_categories.workout_context: Race-pace efforts that mimic Superior Morgul Road Race's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before May.
6,000ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
Superior Morgul Road Race's paved circuit road race on rolling Front Range forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 56 miles.
56 miles on paved circuit road race on rolling Front Range burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
107ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
At Superior Morgul Road Race, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Superior Morgul Road Race. Train it until it feels boring.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on paved circuit road race on rolling Front Range. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 6,000ft of climbing on paved circuit road race on rolling Front Range does to your power file on race day.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Superior Morgul Road Race, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
6,000ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
Base fitness for Superior Morgul Road Race. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Superior Morgul Road Race’s 56 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at Superior Morgul Road Race. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Race Simulation, VO2max, and Gravel Specific to prepare you for 56 miles of paved circuit road race on rolling front range terrain in Superior, Boulder County, Colorado, USA.
